AdditionalAttributes.description:
Unlock Your Gaming Potential
Take your gaming sessions to a whole new level with Doritos Corn Chips Multipack of 8 Cheese Supreme 152g. Each bite delivers the perfect balance of creamy cheese and salty corn chips. Clear those levels and power the game with the iconic Doritos corn chip. Whether you're sharing packets around at home or bringing them along to a group gaming night, they're the perfect, portable companion to any session.

The Classically Crunchy Choice
When you want to feel the crunch between your teeth, Doritos Cheese Supreme corn chips are the perfect snacking choice. Portable and easy to eat on the go, Doritos are ready for any occasion–whether it's hanging out with friends, gaming, or indulging in outdoor activities. Like many snack loves, Doritos Cheese Supreme Corn Chips are bold, edgy and exciting. They're the chip for the curious, the courageous and the creative.

The Multipack That'll Make You The Life of Any Party
This Doritos Corn Chips Multipack is a crowd-favourite, no matter the party. Bring a box to the table, set and forget, or divvy up the 8-pack. Either way, they'll be an instant hit.
With pre-portioned servings, these moreish corn chips will stop you from going overboard.

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Revamp Your Roadtrip
Looking for the perfect snack for the road? Share the love with our Cheetos Cheese & Bacon Balls multipack. Enjoy bite-sized cheese balls full of finger-licking and lip-smacking delight while you’re on the go. With 8 in a pack, there’s enough of the golden cheese puffs for everyone.

Pop Open the Party Favourites
Wow your next party with the fan-favourite cheesy snack. Cheetos Cheese & Bacon balls promise an irresistible flavour combo of smokiness and rich creaminess, followed by iconic texture crispiness. When you’re passing these delightfully cheesy snacks around, everyone will find it difficult to resist. Pop open a pack to celebrate the festivities and savour the Cheetos crunch, they’re sure to hit the spot!

Tasty Treats For Afternoon Hours
They say great things come in small packages. Our multipack of delicious Cheese & Bacon balls is conveniently packed with flavour-bursting puffs of moreish delights. Creamy, savoury and smokey, they’re the perfect addition to snack time after the day's complete, no matter your age.

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!

These chicken crackers are convenient to share as an exciting treat, or perfect for a fun afternoon snack. With no artificial colours or preservatives, Arnott’s Original Mini Chicken Crimpy Shapes crackers are a go-to chicken biscuit for any occasion.

• Box contains 8 individual packs

• Flavour you can see

• Oven baked, not fried

• Aussie made, Aussie loved

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy Fresh Produce Bananas Lady Finger, perfect for a quick snack, naturally sweet and delicious for the whole family. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Lady Finger bananas are shorter, less curved, and can be sweeter than Cavendish bananas.

How to Pick:
Bananas that are yellow and lightly flecked with brown spots will be at their peak flavor. Bananas should be plump, firm, and brightly colored

How to Store:
Store bananas at room temperature, where they will continue to ripen. If you refrigerate your bananas, they will stop ripening, but this will also make the skins go black. The fruit is still okay to eat, but will not be the best quality.

Where it's Grown:
Australian Lady Finger Bananas are grown in Far North Queensland and Northern NSW.

Health Benefits:
Bananas contain potassium for heathy muscle function, and are high in energy-supprting vitamin B6* 

*Based on one large cavendish banana, or 2 medium lady finger bananas (150g), as part of a healthy balanced diet

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Naturally Delicious

Made with only three simple, quality ingredients, Cobs Sea Salt Popcorn contains no artificial flavours, colours, or preservatives. It's gluten-free, nut-free, vegetarian, vegan and contains wholegrain. Next time you need a light, crunchy, and naturally flavourful snack, reach for the popcorn that Aussies love.


Australian-Made

Our Sea Salt is made right here in Australia using quality, locally sourced corn kernels. Popped to perfection in high oleic sunflower or canola oil, we create fluffy and crunchy popcorn, to which we sprinkle the perfect amount of sea salt.


The Perfect Snack for Every Occasion

Whether you're enjoying a backyard barbecue, packing school lunches, or settling in for a cozy movie night, Cobs Sea Salt Popcorn is the go-to snack. Its satisfying crunch and classic salty flavour make it the perfect companion for road trips, picnics, and afternoon pick me-ups.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Woolworths Packham Pears. Sweet, juicy, Australian Grown, perfect for a healthy snack. Each pear is a serve of fruit! Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Packham Pears are a delightful choice, known for their smooth green skin that ripens to a soft yellow. These juicy pears offer a sweet and subtly tangy flavour, making them perfect for snacking or adding to a variety of dishes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose pears that are firm to the touch but yield slightly when gently pressed near the stem. Look for unblemished skin with a smooth appearance.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy Packham pears fresh as a juicy snack, sliced into salads, or paired with cheese on a platter. They are also wonderful baked in desserts, poached, or roasted alongside savoury dishes.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Ripen pears at room temperature until they reach your desired softness. Once ripe, store them in the refrigerator to extend their freshness.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, poach, roast, grill.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy Arnott's Shapes Originals Variety Multipack, perfect for snacking. Oven baked, not fried, with popular flavours. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Arnott's Shapes Originals Variety 15 Multipack Biscuits includes 15 individual packs snack, with five packs of three Shapes Originals savoury biscuits varieties: Barbecue, Pizza and Mini Chicken Crimpy. Perfectly sized for snacking on-the-go and lunch box essentials.

Arnott's Shapes Originals Variety 15 Multipack Biscuits
Enjoy the ultimate snack experience with Arnott's Shapes Originals Variety 15 Multipack Biscuits! This multipack includes 15 convenient individual packs, making it perfect for lunch boxes, on-the-go snacks, or sharing with family and friends. Each pack is portioned just for you, offering a savoury snack bursting with bold flavours that everyone will love.

These cracker chips are made with no artificial colours or preservatives, so you can enjoy their deliciousness guilt-free. With loads of flavour you can see, Arnott's Shapes are a must-have for any snack lover. The assorted pack features Aussie favourite savoury biscuit flavours, including Barbecue, Pizza, and Mini Chicken Crimpy – each one packed with bags of flavour!

Whether you're looking for a quick snack, a tasty addition to your lunch box, or a savoury treat to share, Arnott's Shapes Originals Variety 15 Multipack Biscuits are the perfect choice. Stock up on this multipack today and satisfy your cravings with every bite!

• Variety pack of 15 individually wrapped packs, conveniently sized for snacking

• Includes 5 packs each of Arnott’s Shapes Originals Barbecue, Pizza and Mini Chicken Crimpy flavours

• Flavour you can see

• Oven baked, not fried

• Aussie made, Aussie loved
